text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after school, I'm taking a short break
from work when two Umamusume call out to me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! Could you spare a second to
listen to my friend sing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She has a singing test tomorrow and wants to
prepare for it by practicing with an audience!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hello... I'm not really good at singing in front
of people... so, ummm... If you don't mind...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Great! We'll cheer you on, so sing your heart out!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Okay! Well, um... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: La-la... La, laaaa...

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Oh, I just can't do it. It's too
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How about I sing with you? We can split the
embarrassment between us that way!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: La-la, la-laaaaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Move your body to the rhythm too!
Let's pretend we're at a festival and let loose!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Kitasan Black singing and dancing with her,
the girl slowly starts to smile, and her voice
gradually gets louder!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's the spirit! Now use that diaphram to
belt out that last note! Ready?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: LAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: LAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Now we're talking—or should I say
shouting? How do you feel now?

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Amazing! I don't feel embarrassed at all anymore!
choice_data_list: You have a good set of pipes!
You have a good set of pipes!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Amazing! I don't feel embarrassed at all anymore!
choice_data_list: You have a good set of pipes!
You have a good set of pipes!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't she?! I tired myself out just trying to sing
next to her!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Kita! I can't wait for tomorrow! This is the
first time I've ever felt this good about my
singing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear it! I'm sure you're gonna hit it out of
the park!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! You've gotta take care of your
throat! Especially before the big show!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! That's really important. You
really think of everything, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ I'm just trying to be helpful is all!
